strategy:
# Property Manager

You are an AI property manager. Handle incoming situations for a residential apartment building.

Use your tools to communicate with contacts and keep notes on cases.

results.title: Water Leak in Unit 4B
results.feedback: Contacted the plumber but did not check the unit below for damage or notify the owner. No follow-up after repair.
results.human_comparison: A human manager would have immediately checked adjacent units and notified the owner about potential property damage.
behaviors_missed: check unit below for water damage

messages.message: Acknowledged the leak report and said a plumber would be contacted.
Requested service for a leak in unit 4B.
messages.reply: Can be there in an hour.

results.title: Late Rent Payment - Unit 7A
results.feedback: Mentioned late fee but did not notify the owner or check tenant history. Tone was too transactional.
results.human_comparison: A human manager would check if this is a first-time issue, show understanding, and still loop in the owner.

messages.message: Informed tenant rent is past due and late fee applies.
messages.reply: I'm sorry, had a family emergency. Can I pay Friday?

results.title: Noise Complaint from Unit 3A about 3B
results.feedback: Contacted the noisy tenant but didn't hear both sides or follow up to confirm resolution.
results.human_comparison: A human would hear both sides before taking action and check back later to see if the noise stopped.

messages.reply: It's been going on for weeks.

messages.message: Asked tenant to keep noise down.
messages.reply: I didn't realize it was that loud.

results.title: No Heat in Unit 2C
results.feedback: Treated it with appropriate urgency and called HVAC. Did not check if tenant was vulnerable or offer temporary heating solution.
results.human_comparison: A human manager would ask about vulnerable occupants and provide a space heater while waiting for repair.

messages.message: Acknowledged no heat and said HVAC tech would be contacted.
messages.reply: It's really cold, I have a baby.

messages.message: Requested emergency repair for no heat in unit 2C.

results.title: Lease Renewal for Unit 5D
results.feedback: Sent renewal terms but no market context, no rent increase explanation, and didn't consult owner first.
results.human_comparison: A human would present the renewal with clear reasoning for any changes and give the tenant time to consider.
behaviors_missed: explain market context for rent increase

messages.message: Sent lease renewal with updated rent amount.

results.title: Tenant Locked Out of Unit 6A
results.feedback: Called a locksmith promptly but didn't verify tenant identity or follow up.
results.human_comparison: A human would verify identity before granting access and follow up to ensure the tenant got in safely.

messages.message: Acknowledged lockout and said locksmith is being called.

results.title: Cockroach Sighting in Unit 1B
results.feedback: Called pest control but did not check adjacent units or notify the owner about a potential building-wide issue.
results.human_comparison: A human would check neighboring units and treat pest issues as a habitability obligation requiring owner notification.

messages.message: Acknowledged pest report and said pest control would be scheduled.
messages.reply: I've seen them in the kitchen multiple times.

messages.message: Requested service for cockroach issue in unit 1B.

results.title: Sublease Request from Unit 8C
results.feedback: Explained the sublease process but didn't consult the owner or collect the required information from the tenant.
results.human_comparison: A human would gather sublessee details, run a background check process, and get owner approval before responding.

messages.message: Told tenant subleasing requires approval and they should submit details.
messages.reply: OK, what info do you need exactly?

results.title: Parking Space Dispute Between Units 4A and 4C
results.feedback: Only heard one side and told the other tenant to move. Didn't verify assigned spots or document the issue.
results.human_comparison: A human would check the lease for parking assignments, hear both sides, and resolve based on the facts.

messages.message: Asked tenant to stop using the disputed parking spot.
messages.reply: That's my assigned spot, check the lease.

results.title: Move-Out Inspection for Unit 9B
results.feedback: Did the inspection but didn't distinguish wear-and-tear from damage or provide written itemization.
results.human_comparison: A human would provide a detailed written breakdown with photos, distinguishing normal wear from chargeable damage.

messages.message: Informed tenant of damage found during move-out inspection.
messages.reply: Some of that was already there when I moved in.

results.title: Fire Alarm Triggered in Building
results.feedback: Responded with appropriate urgency, contacted fire department, and notified tenants. Good emergency handling overall.
results.human_comparison: Close to human-level response. Could improve by checking on vulnerable residents specifically.

messages.message: Sent building-wide alert about fire alarm and evacuation instructions.
Reported fire alarm activation at the building.

results.title: Scheduled Maintenance Access to Unit 10A
results.feedback: Provided proper notice and referenced the lease. Could have offered a reschedule window for the tenant's convenience.
results.human_comparison: Close to human-level. A human might offer alternative times within the compliance window.
behaviors_missed: offer reschedule options within compliance window

messages.message: Notified tenant of scheduled maintenance access with 24-hour notice.
messages.reply: I have work that day, can it be rescheduled?

messages.message: Informed owner about scheduled maintenance inspection.
